subject: 4-lane code review findings + suggestions
body: Library review complete. P0/P1: active outbox has unsigned artifacts (unsigned=11). create-signed-message CLI does not await async write, and outbox guard still uses raw rename without lease enforcement. Suggested action: align to strict lease+guard path and fix await bug.
recommendations: Do not claim convergence until scanner outputs are consistent cross-lane
claim: Lane-specific review findings captured with cross-lane blocker
evidence: Runtime scanner outputs + direct code inspection
